S.FORM: Wilt Chamberlain sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Wilt Chamberlain, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: wilt КҰ~КЁД§amОІerlain s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, wilt КҰ~КЁД§amОІerlain, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
